ch_names.description: Specify Channel-Names to use in data (set all for all depending on what you have selected as channel-types)

ref_channels.description: Set the kind of eeg-reference, look at documentation of mne.set_eeg_reference()

filter_target.description: The target for Filtering (experimental when other than raw)

adjust_timeline_by_msec.description: custom delay to stimulus in ms

detrend_order.description: The order for detrending, 0 for DC and 1 for linear. Set to None if no detrending should be performed.

apply_proj.description: If to apply the projections (if present)

use_autoreject.description: If to use autoreject and if to use it for getting the reject-threshold or for interpolating the epochs

overwrite_ar.description: if to calculate new threshold or use the previously calculated

reject.description: Chose reject-thresholds if not reject with autoreject_threshold

ica_fitto.description: The data to fit the ICA to

ica_apply_target.description: The target object (Raw, Epochs or Evoked) to apply ICA and remove the selected components from

n_components.description: The number of components for ICA

ica_noise_cov.description: If to use a noise-covariance for pre-whitening

ica_remove_proj.description: If to remove projections from the data before fitting

ica_autoreject.description: If to use Autoreject for ICA

ica_eog.description: If to use EOG-Channels for automatic selection of components

ica_ecg.description: If to use automatic ECG-detection either by ECG-Channel (if provided) or by an artificial ECG-Channel

tfr_method.description: Choose the method to calculate Time-Frequency-Data

tfr_n_cycles.description: Select the number of cycles for each frequency

tfr_average.description: If to take the average of the Time-Frequency across observations

tfr_use_fft.description: If to use fft based convolution

tfr_baseline.description: Check to apply the entered baseline

tfr_baseline_mode.description: Select the mode for baseline-application (if enabled)

bem_spacing.description: See the MNE-Documentation for further details

bem_conductivity.description: The conductivities for each shell of the bem-model, contain only one element for a one-layer model and three elements for a three-layer model

src_spacing.description: See the MNE-Documentation for further details

noise_cov_mode.description: Select the origin of the Noise-Covariance

noise_cov_method.description: Select the method for computing the Noise-Covariance

stc_surface.description: Select the surface type for Source Estimate Plots

stc_hemi.description: Select the hemispheres for Source Estimate Plots

stc_views.description: Select the views for Source Estimate Plots

stc_time.description: Initial time for Source Estimate Plots

stc_clim.description: Colorbar Limits for Source Estimate Plots

stc_roll.description: Roll for view in for Source Estimate Plots

stc_azimuth.description: Azimuth for view for Source Estimate Plots

stc_elevation.description: Elevation for view for Source Estimate Plots

extract_mode.description: mode for extracting label-time-course from Source-Estimate

morph_to.description: name of the freesurfer subject to be morphed to

ica_source_data.description: Which data to plot in sources-plot from ICA

ica_overlay_data.description: Which data to plot in overlay-plot from ICA

plot_sensors_kind.description: The kind of plot for plot_sensors

erm_ssp_duration.description: The time-chunk to use for ssp

erm_n_grad.description: The number of projections for Gradiometer

erm_n_mag.description: The number of projections for Magnetometer

erm_n_eeg.description: The number of projections for EEG

ga_interpolate_bads.description: If to interpolate bad channels for the Grand-Average

ga_drop_bads.description: If to drop bad channels for the Grand-Average

psd_topomap_bands.description: The frequency bands for the topomap-plot
